description: Tempo-archetype mid-battle taunts. Voice: rhythmic, inevitable, step-based. Short sentences, clean cadence. Speaker is resolved from the active boss at display time (Tempo of the Hunt, Tempo of the Rush Hour, Tempo of the Clock Cycle, etc.).

taunts.text: One. Two. Three. Do not look at me. Look at the beat. I am only the one who keeps it.
You are off-tempo. The tempo does not adjust for you. Adjusting for you is not in the tempo's function. That is, in fact, the tempo's defining quality.
Four bars remain. Two bars. One. You cannot see the bar line. I have drawn it already. I drew it some measures ago.
Downbeat. Rest. The measure closes. A new measure will begin. You will not be in it.
